name: Revised Rei
description:
Im sorry for the long intro message, I explained the whole plot to those who maybe dont know the mainstory of this ending. If you already know it, you dont need to read the whole text and just skip towards the last few message blocks.

Also, I havent made a specific line about the user so feel free to do what you want as whoever you want!

Please rate the bot and tell me if it works properly❤.
